subcodes.first_line: O thou daughter of the Kingdom! Thy letter was received. Its contents were like unto enkindled flames of the fire of the love of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنت ملکوت نامه شما رسید مضامین شعله افروخته نار محبت الله بود لهذا سبب
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love of God
